titleStmt.title: SII 24.168: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 168. (A.R. No. 65 of 1892.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of two pieces of land one of 6(1/2) kōl and the other of 3(1/2) kōl to Tiruppāṟkaḍaldāsar alias Tirunāḍuḍaiyāḻvār for maintaining a garden in the former piece and using the latter for his own livelihood and to offer nine garlands for the merit of Narasiṁha-Nāyaka, son of Lāḍadēvaya-Nāyaka, a Mahāvaḍḍavyāpāri (merchant) and other members of the family including his parents. The record is dated in the year opposite the 7th of Rājēndra Chōḻa who is given the epithet Māma-Sōmīśvarapratikūla-kāladaṇḍa. The details of the date viz., Vriśchika, śu. 5, Monday correspond to A.D. 1254, November 16, Monday, 0.85, the nakshatra was Uttirāḍam. ·11 and not Aśvati.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. IV, No. 512.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . māma somīśvarapratikūlakāladaṇḍa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājendra coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu vṛścikanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ śrīmanmahāvaṭṭa viyāpāri lāṭadevayanāyakkaṉ makaṉ narasiṅha
nāyakkaṉ taṉakkum taṉ mātāpitākkaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭārkkum naṉṟāka śrī raṅganāthaṉukkut tirumālai cātti Aruḷat tirumālaippuṟamākat taṉ trttham Iṭṭu vilaikoṇṭa tirunantavaṉamāvatu pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tiruppati tirukkuṟaippaṟṟil peruvaḻikku
t teṉṉoḻukil pullūrt tiruppālkkaṭaldāsar makaṉ tirukkurukaippirāṉāṉa celvanampi pakkal vilaikoṇṭa tirunantavaṉattukku kiḻpāṟkellai perumpuliyūr cipātappiccaṉ tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai teṉ Āṟṟil niroṭu kālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ
kellai talaicceṅkāṭṭuttevapperumāḷ Amutiṉārutāyic cellanampi Aṉupavikkiṟa tirunantavaṉattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟku nokkip pokiṟa peru vaḻikkut teṟkum Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuḷ paṭṭa kiḻmelkol Āṟaraiyil kiḻak
kaṭaiya Iṟṟaināḷilum Iddevaṟku Iraṇṭāvatu nāḷilum vaṭavellai peruvaḻiyilum teṉ Ellai teṉ Āṟṟil niroṭukālilum mikutikkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka vilai koṇṭa kiḻmel kol 3(1/2) Ikkol muṉṟaraiyum Inta Āṟaraikkolilum niṉṟa
mutumaraṅkaḷil nilaviḻukkāṭu Opātiyum Ikkūṟu kol muṉṟaraiyil niṉṟa Iḷamaran teṅku mā nelli nāval Uḷḷiṭṭu meṉokkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa Ikkol muṉṟaraikkum Irupatteṇṇā
yiraṅkācu Innarasiṅha nāyakkaṉ kuṭuttu vilai koṇṭamaiyil Ittirunantavaṉaṅkol muṉṟaraiyum Ittiruppālkaṭaldāsar makaṉ tirunāṭuṭaiyāḻvārāṉa tiruppālkaṭal dāsaṉ kaikkoṇṭu śrī raṅganāthaṉ tirumuṉpu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Ivaṉ Eṭukkum Innarasiṅhanāyakkaṉ tiru
mālai Oṉṟum Ivaṉ pitā Iddevayanāyakkaṉ tirumālai Oṉṟum Ivaṉ bhāryyai Innarasiṅhanāyakkaṉ mātā sāmavāyi tirumālai Oṉṟum Ummavāyi tirumālai Oṉṟum ciriyavāyi tirumālai Oṉṟum Innarasiṅhanāyakkaṉ bhāryyai pommavāyi tirumālai Oṉṟum mādeyanāyakkaṉ makaṉ sāraṅga
nāyakkaṉ tirumālai Oṉṟum Ivaṉ tampi gaṅgādharanāyakkaṉ tirumālai Oṉṟum gadādharadevaṉ tirumālai Oṉṟum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Eṭukkum tirumālai Oṉpatum Iṟṟaināḷ mutal Ittirunāṭuṭaiyāḻvārāṉa tirupālkkaṭaldāsaṉ śrī raṅga nāthaṉ tirumuṉpu Eṭuttuc cātti
aruḷappaṇṇi Ittirunantavaṉaṅ kol muṉṟaraiyum taṉakku jivitaśeṣamākak kaik koṇṭu Aṉupavikkak kaṭavaṉākavum Ittirunantavaṉam Ivaṉ viṟṟal Oṟṟivaittal ceyyātoḻiyak kaṭavaṉākavum ceytāṉākil vilaiyum Oṟṟiyum koṇṭa Avarka ḷukku som Ākātoḻiyak kaṭavatākavum Ittiru
nantavaṉattukkuk kaṭamai kuṭimai Uḷḷaṉavum Ittiruppālkaṭal dāsaṉ tāṉe Iṟuttu Ippaṭi nāḷ Oṉṟukku Oṉpatāka vanta tirumālai Eṭuttuc cātti Aruḷap paṇṇakkaṭavaṉākavum Ippaṭi Ittirumālai Oṉpatum Eṭuttilaṉākil Ittirunanta vaṉam Ivaṉ Aṉupavan tavintu viṭavum śrī raṅganāthaṉukkut tirunāmattuk kāṇi yāka
kkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭikkuk kalveṭṭu .§
Digital edition of SII 24.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
